title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Baxter India International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Baxter India International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Baxter India International Enterprises in Varanasi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Baxter India International Enterprises:
Baxter India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Baxter India International Enterprises!
